name: Gerd von Rundstedt
longDesc: Gerd von Rundstedt est un général infanterie de qualité or — Allemagne. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Street Fighting
skills.desc: Damage to the enemy +5 when fighting in the city

skills.name: Guerrilla
skills.desc: 12% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Elastic Defence
skills.desc: Fix nearby fortress units: each round HP+4

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4

trainedSkills.name: Iron Will
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding infantry , lower damage received by 20%. After being attacked by enemy, increase damage reduction by additional 10%, lasting for 1 turn, stackable up to 3 times.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.desc: After attacking, there is 60% to gain "provocation" effect

longDescEn: Gerd von Rundstedt is a gold-quality infantry general — Germany. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Gerd von Rundstedt ist ein Gold-Infanterie-General — Deutschland. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
